name: South of the Boarder
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare about 2 teaspoons of the hot pepper by chopping it up. Remember, the "heat" is in the seeds and membranes inside, so if you want to keep it relatively mild, remove all of that.
2. Using an electric mixer, blend all the ingredients.
3. Spread the mixture evenly on a flour tortilla and roll it up.
4. Chill in the refrigerator.
5. To serve, cut the roll into small log segments and serve with some mild salsa.
